message:
feat(engine): variable declaration parsing and test evidence release gate

Two significant feature additions:

parser.rs (+201): Implements variable declaration parsing for the
FRX parser. Adds VariableDeclaration, VariableDeclarationKind (Const,
Let, Var), and VariableDeclarator AST nodes. Implements
parse_var_declaration() with helper functions for splitting
declarator segments and assignments. Enables parsing of
'const x = 1, y = 2' style declarations.

proof_release_gate.rs (+321): Adds TestEvidenceBundle struct for
validating test quality before release. Enforces minimum thresholds
for mutation score, logging coverage, and test evidence density.
Adds 5 new GateFailureCode variants (InsufficientTestEvidence,
LoggingQualityBelow*, MutationScoreBelow*) for structured failure
reporting.

Also:
- proof_release_gate_integration.rs (+134): Integration tests for
  the new test evidence gate scenarios
- parser_event_ast_equivalence.rs (+9): Enhanced to include "full"
  scenario with scenario_id validation
- parser_event_ast_equivalence_v1.json (+5): New "full" test fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
